parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $now.toFormat('yyyyMMddHHmmssSSS') + '-feedback-' + $json.actor, peers: Object.fromEntries([[$json.actor, {}], ['human', {}]]), metadata: { type: 'feedback_session', target_actor: $json.actor } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: [{ content: JSON.stringify({ ts: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.evaluated_at, type: 'score_given', actor: 'human', payload: { score: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.score, rationale: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.rationale, rationale_ungrounded: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.rationale_ungrounded, decision_ref: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.decision_ref, target_actor: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.actor, agent_judgment: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.agent_judgment, human_correction: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.human_correction, delta: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.delta, dimensions: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.dimensions } }), peer_id: 'human', metadata: { type: 'activity_log', record_type: 'score_given', peer_target: 'ai', has_delta: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.delta !== null && $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.delta.self_correction === true, has_dimensions: $node['평가 입력 검증'].json.dimensions !== null } }] }) }}
